result: Validation complete. One minor issue found: the hints array is incomplete and should include all property names from the attributes table for better AI discoverability.

findings.description: Hints are incomplete. All property names from the attributes table should be included in hints for comprehensive discoverability. Currently only includes the 3 most critical attributes (src, alt, secure), but the table defines 14 properties total (including generic attributes reference).
findings.source_evidence: Source table lists: 汎用属性, src, alt, name, longdesc, height, width, usemap, ismap, align, border, hspace, vspace, secure. Knowledge file hints only include: img要素, 画像, URI, 属性, src, alt, secure. Missing: name, longdesc, height, width, usemap, ismap, align, border, hspace, vspace
